items.title: Israel strikes southern Lebanon as Hezbollah condemns new deal
items.dek: Strikes have killed at least one person, state media say a day after Lebanon and Israel signed a framework agreement.
items.body: Strikes have killed at least one person, state media say a day after Lebanon and Israel signed a framework agreement.

items.title: Panic attacks and fractures - Venezuela hospital treats earthquake victims
items.dek: The BBC travelled to a Caracas hospital that is treating people from the worst affected areas.
